Class AbstractCollection<DataT extends AbstractData>

java.lang.Object
model.AbstractData
model.AbstractCollection<DataT>
Type Parameters:
DataT - the type of AbstractData items in the collection
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObservable, ISerializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Checklist, Workspace
public abstract class AbstractCollection<DataT extends AbstractData> extends AbstractData
Abstract data model that provides the tools to manage a collection of AbstractData items. It extends AbstractData as well and notifies any registered observer whenever the collection has been modified.
